# Anduril Industries Awarded £17 million Ministry of Defence Force Protection Technology Contract

Anduril to to explore future capabilities for fixed installation Force Protection and Counter Intrusion, and Counter-Unmanned Aerial Systems for the Royal Air Force and Strategic Command on Permanent Joint Operating Bases (PJOBs).
